CW2 Multi-Factor L/S Equity Backtest Engine#

Team Kolmogorov — IFTE0003 Big Data in Quantitative Finance · UCL MSc Banking and Digital Finance.

Sector-neutral, dollar-neutral monthly long/short equity backtest on the 678-stock CW1 universe. The implemented composite combines two factors — momentum (12-1) and value (B/P + E/P + CF/P) — at equal 50/50 weights, after Coursework 1’s four-factor proposal was reduced based on out-of-sample information-coefficient evidence. Methodology, results, and limitations are documented in the accompanying report.
